primary_keyword_volume_band._note: Single point estimate is 900/mo (matches dossier prose); 720–1200 is the inferred uncertainty band from sibling-cluster signals. Both prose and JSON now agree on 900 as the headline.

serp_format_share_observed._methodology: Observation across the top 10 DuckDuckGo HTML SERP results (US, 2026-05-06). N=10, single search engine, Google blocked headless. Treat as a SERP snapshot, NOT a market share. Re-pull on Google when MCP unblocks.

industry_size_usd_b_verified._meta: Grand View Research via PR Newswire, Sep 2023, https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/global-chatbot-market-size-worth-11-5-billion-by-2027-grand-view-research-inc-301696276.html . NOTE: prior 'ai_companion_segment_2023=2.8 / 2028=9.5' figures (luvr.ai) failed primary-source verification across 3 search attempts and have been removed.

genai_app_market_h1_2025_sensor_tower._source: Sensor Tower H1 2025 GenAI report via Yahoo Finance / TechCrunch (Jul 30, 2025): https://finance.yahoo.com/news/gen-ai-apps-doubled-revenue-141446411.html . The $82M is the AI companion *category*, NOT Character.AI alone — listicles conflate.

engagement_signals_verified._meta: Character.AI MAU peak-to-trough only — chart-ready (two points, same metric, same platform). Sources: Business of Apps (https://www.businessofapps.com/data/character-ai-statistics/), Sacra (https://sacra.com/c/character-ai/). Filtered in revision pass on 2026-05-06 to address visuals-adversarial CRITICAL #1: prior third point (replika_installs_google_play_millions_may_2024=10) was a different metric on a different platform and contradicted the chart title. Moved to replika_installs_aux. Removed unverified figures: '525% YoY search growth', 'character_ai_monthly_visits_millions=100', 'daily_open_rate_share=0.67', 'emotional_attachment_within_3_weeks_share=0.45' — all failed primary-source verification.

replika_installs_aux._meta: Aux key (not chart-ready alongside Character.AI MAU). Replika Google Play install count, May 2024. Source: Google Play listing. Held here for prose use; do NOT plot together with Character.AI MAU (different metric, different platform).

privacy_and_safety_verified._source_mozilla: Mozilla Foundation, Privacy Not Included, 'Romantic AI Chatbots Don't Have Your Privacy at Heart', Feb 14, 2024: https://foundation.mozilla.org/en/privacynotincluded/articles/happy-valentines-day-romantic-ai-chatbots-dont-have-your-privacy-at-heart/
privacy_and_safety_verified._source_muah: Have I Been Pwned, https://haveibeenpwned.com/Breach/Muah ; Linklaters writeup, https://www.linklaters.com/en/insights/blogs/digilinks/2024/october/the-muah-ai-data-breach---extortion-threats-and-cyber-vulnerabilities

mit_openai_chatbot_rct.headline_finding: higher daily usage across all modalities and conversation types correlates with higher loneliness, emotional dependence, and problematic use, and lower socialization with real people
mit_openai_chatbot_rct._source: MIT Media Lab × OpenAI longitudinal RCT, March 2025: https://www.media.mit.edu/publications/how-ai-and-human-behaviors-shape-psychosocial-effects-of-chatbot-use-a-longitudinal-controlled-study/

_meta.source: DuckDuckGo HTML SERP (US, 2026-05-06); WebFetch top-5 SERP pages; sibling dossier ai-girlfriend.md (Ahrefs May 2026) for parent-cluster volume; OpenRouter o4-mini deep-research fallback; revision-pass primary-source verifications via WebSearch + WebFetch (Mozilla, HIBP, Linklaters, Business of Apps, Sacra, Sensor Tower / Yahoo Finance, MIT Media Lab, Wired, Reuters).
